# Token Authority

**Status:** Stub (Step 1). Populated in Step 4.

`src/tokens/tokens.json` is the single source of truth for all design values.

## Edit here

- `src/tokens/tokens.json`

## Do not edit

- `theme/ecdysiz-core/assets/css/generated/tokens.css` (generated)
- `dist/ecz-variables.json` (generated)
- Elementor UI Global Settings (read-only on production)
- Raw hex / px values anywhere in component CSS
